text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
38 
FIDE_SNP 
LABEL: 
Fully Integrated Dual Eligible (FIDE) SNP 
DESCRIPTION: Indicates if a Dual Eligible Special Needs Plan (SNP) is a Fully Integrated Dual Eligible (FIDE) SNP. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: FIDE_SNP 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 
N = No 
9 = Not Applicable 
X = Unknown 

COMMENT: 
This variable was new in 2012. 
The CCW
